title: Analyze Security Impact of Changes Prior to Implementation
description: Analyze the security impact of changes prior to implementation.

checks.name: Change Management Process Enforces Pre-Change Security Review
checks.purpose: Verify that a security impact analysis step is documented and enforced in the change management process before changes are applied to this system

checks.name: Unapproved Configuration Changes are Detectable
checks.purpose: Confirm that configuration drift from baseline is detectable via GPO compliance reporting, SCCM, or equivalent tooling

checks.name: Change Management Process Enforces Pre-Change Security Review
checks.purpose: Verify that a security impact analysis step is documented and enforced in the change management process before changes are applied to this server

checks.name: Unapproved Configuration Changes are Detectable
checks.purpose: Confirm configuration drift from baseline is detectable via GPO compliance reporting, SCCM baseline compliance, or SIEM alerts

checks.name: Patch Testing Environment Exists Before Production Deployment
checks.purpose: Verify patches and updates are staged in a test environment before production deployment to assess security impact

checks.name: FIM Baseline is Current and Reflects Approved State
checks.purpose: Verify the AIDE or equivalent FIM database has been updated after approved changes, reflecting only authorized system state

checks.name: Package Updates Require Authorization
checks.purpose: Confirm unattended-upgrades or yum-cron is configured to require approval or is disabled, preventing unauthorized automatic changes

checks.name: Unapproved Configuration Changes are Detectable
checks.purpose: Verify auditd or FIM is configured to alert on unauthorized changes to critical configuration files and system binaries

checks.name: FIM Baseline is Current and Reflects Approved State
checks.purpose: Verify the AIDE or equivalent FIM database has been updated after approved changes, reflecting only authorized system state

checks.name: Package Updates Require Authorization
checks.purpose: Confirm unattended-upgrades is configured to require approval or is disabled on Debian, preventing unauthorized automatic changes

checks.name: Unapproved Configuration Changes are Detectable
checks.purpose: Verify auditd or FIM is configured to alert on unauthorized changes to critical configuration files and system binaries

remediation: Implement a formal change management process requiring security impact analysis before changes are approved. Use SCCM, Ansible, or equivalent to detect configuration drift. Update FIM baselines only after approved changes. Maintain a staging or test environment for pre-production validation of patches and configuration changes.
